name: Variety Pack Popsicles
recipeIngredient: Vanilla ice cream, softened (1 pint) or Plain yogurt (2 containers)
1 1/4 cups apricot nectar or canned pineapple juice
6 oz can peaches in light syrup or 2 fresh ripe peaches (sliced and pitted)
Frozen orange juice (or any other flavored juice) frozen in ice cube trays
recipeInstructions:
1. Whirl the ingredients in a blender.
2. Pour into molds and insert sticks.
3. Freeze.
Polynesian Popsicles
1. Pour milk into a blender.
2. Add gelatin and let soften for one minute.
3. Whip the rest of the ingredients in the blender until smooth.
4. Pour into molds, insert sticks, and freeze.
Creamsicles
1. Whip the cream in a blender for 30-45 seconds.
2. Add peaches and honey (if using).
3. Whirl until smooth.
4. Pour into molds, insert sticks, and freeze.
Chocolate Pops
1. Blend all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
2. Pour into molds, insert sticks, and freeze.
Keep-on-Hand Snow Cones
1. Put the frozen juice cubes into a blender.
2. Turn on the blender until the juice reaches a snowy consistency.
3. Pour into cups and serve.
Watermelon Popsicles
1. Blend all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
2. Pour into molds, insert sticks, and freeze.
